claims.summary: A 12D glimpse must remain an additive summary and never become a write-back replacement for the semantic lane.
claims.disposition: verify the typed telemetry view validates exactly 12 finite values while current observer evidence and authority markers keep it summary-only and non-directive

claims.summary: Compression should not erase tail, narrative, residual, or history-heavy texture that remains visible in wider evidence.
claims.disposition: verify current telemetry and codec projections retain the 48D narrative/tail lanes, residual deformation trace, eigenvector field, and raw producer evidence alongside the 12D view

claims.summary: A high-compression comparison should measure whether persistent texture survives the 12D summary.
claims.disposition: route a capture-first baseline/candidate dossier comparing existing additive glimpse evidence with wider residual and tail fixtures; no live write is required

claims.summary: A viscosity-retention coefficient could influence how compression is calibrated.
claims.disposition: keep evidence-only coefficient exploration in the dossier; any use that changes codec vectors, transport, checkpoint authority, pressure, fill, PI, or controller behavior requires separate Tier 5 approval
